title: Christmas Bruschetta
ingredients: 1 can small artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
1/4 cup freshly grated parmesan cheese, plus more for topping
instructions: In a small bowl, blend butter and garlic.
Spread garlic butter on baguette slices and toast under broiler.
In a separate bowl, mix together artichoke hearts, tomato, scallions, oregano, Greek seasoning, feta cheese, and parmesan cheese.
Spoon artichoke/feta mixture onto baguette slices.
Broil until bubbly and lightly browned.
